title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms Digital Technologies family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms Digital Technologies:
OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms Digital Technologies!
